mapper.select:
SELECT t1.*, t2.EMPID, t2.LOCAL_NAME, t3.ORG_NAME_LOCAL FROM HR_FAMILY t1 LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE t2 ON t1.PERSON_ID = t2.PERSON_ID LEFT JOIN HR_DEPARTMENT t3 ON t2.DEPTNO = t3.DEPTNO WHERE 1=1 AND (t1.ACTIVITY = 1 OR t1.ACTIVITY IS NULL)
AND t2.EMPID LIKE '%' || #{empId} || '%'
AND t2.LOCAL_NAME LIKE '%' || #{localName} || '%'
AND t1.FAM_NAME LIKE '%' || #{famName} || '%'
ORDER BY t1.FAMILY_NO DESC

SELECT t1.*, t2.EMPID, t2.LOCAL_NAME, t3.ORG_NAME_LOCAL FROM HR_FAMILY t1 LEFT JOIN HR_EMPLOYEE t2 ON t1.PERSON_ID = t2.PERSON_ID LEFT JOIN HR_DEPARTMENT t3 ON t2.DEPTNO = t3.DEPTNO WHERE t1.FAMILY_NO = #{familyNo} AND (t1.ACTIVITY = 1 OR t1.ACTIVITY IS NULL)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HR_FAMILY ( FAMILY_NO, PERSON_ID, FAM_TYPE_CODE, FAM_NAME, FAM_BORNDATE, FAM_IDCARD, FAM_PHONE, FAM_COMPANY_NAME, LIVE_YN, EMERGENCY_CONTACT_YN, FAM_PERSON_ID, FAM_ADDRESS, TAX_YN, GENDER, FAM_EMAIL, OCUPATION, REMARKS, ACTIVITY, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_IP ) VALUES ( HR_FAMILY_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{personId}, #{famTypeCode}, #{famName}, #{famBorndate}, #{famIdcard}, #{famPhone}, #{famCompanyName}, #{liveYn}, #{emergencyContactYn}, #{famPersonId}, #{famAddress}, #{taxYn}, #{gender}, #{famEmail}, #{ocupation}, #{remarks}, 1, SYSDATE, #{adminID}, #{adminIP}, SYSDATE, #{adminID}, #{adminIP} )
mapper.update: UPDATE HR_FAMILY SET PERSON_ID = #{personId}, FAM_TYPE_CODE = #{famTypeCode}, FAM_NAME = #{famName}, FAM_BORNDATE = #{famBorndate}, FAM_IDCARD = #{famIdcard}, FAM_PHONE = #{famPhone}, FAM_COMPANY_NAME = #{famCompanyName}, LIVE_YN = #{liveYn}, EMERGENCY_CONTACT_YN = #{emergencyContactYn}, FAM_PERSON_ID = #{famPersonId}, FAM_ADDRESS = #{famAddress}, TAX_YN = #{taxYn}, GENDER = #{gender}, FAM_EMAIL = #{famEmail}, OCUPATION = #{ocupation}, REMARKS = #{remarks}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP} WHERE FAMILY_NO = #{familyNo}
